notes: Best overall provider: `kitten/kitten-tts-nano` scored 72.87/100 using balanced overall weighting.
Worst overall provider: `elevenlabs/eleven_v3` scored 38.72/100 using balanced overall weighting.
The cheapest cloud provider was `gemini/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts` at 0.0306¢ ($0.0003).
No roundtrip STT data was available. Ranking used a composite of speaking rate naturalness (60%), cost (20%), and speed (20%).

tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.description: Best balanced options across accuracy, processing speed, and cost efficiency.

tiers.label: Tier 2
tiers.description: Middle options that miss Tier 1 but may have a specific accuracy, speed, or cost advantage.

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.description: Lowest balanced options, generally weaker across the combined benchmark categories.
